Auto sea routes with waypoints worldwide

About this app

Plan any voyage with confidence. SeaWise calculates optimal sea routes, fuel consumption, and voyage costs instantly — from route planning to final cost analysis.

Plot waypoints worldwide, monitor vessel fuel curves, track live bunker prices across major ports, and review complete voyage economics. Built for captains, fleet managers, and maritime professionals.
